revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar}} The '''{{tlx|WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar}}''' template is used on pages related to the [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes | WikiProject Infoboxes]], without [[WP:SUBST|substitution]], allowing the automatic inclusion of future modifications. == Usage == Place this sidebar template at the top of pages relevant to Infoboxes. The template is expanded by default. The parameter ''collapsed'' may be used to collapse the sidebar listing and hide the detail. : {{WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar |collapsed}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject Infoboxes| Sidebar]] [[Category:WikiProject navigational templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar}} The '''{{tlx|WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar}}''' template is used on pages related to the [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes | WikiProject Infoboxes]], without [[WP:SUBST|substitution]], allowing the automatic inclusion of future modifications. == Usage == Place this sidebar template at the top of pages relevant to Infoboxes. The template is expanded by default. The parameter ''collapsed'' may be used to collapse the sidebar listing and hide the detail. : {{WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar |collapsed}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject Infoboxes| Sidebar]] [[Category:WikiProject navigational templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

The template is expanded by default. The parameter ''collapsed'' may be used to collapse the sidebar listing and hide the detail. : {{WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar |collapsed}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject Infoboxes| Sidebar]] [[Category:WikiProject navigational templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]

The template is expanded by default.
